# Script to check channel dimensions of ResNet50
import torch
import torchvision.models as models

# Load pretrained ResNet50
backbone = models.resnet50(weights='IMAGENET1K_V2')

# Create a dummy input
x = torch.randn(1, 3, 224, 224)

# Forward through different layers
x0 = backbone.conv1(x)
x0 = backbone.bn1(x0)
x0 = backbone.relu(x0)
print(f'After conv1: {x0.shape}')

x = backbone.maxpool(x0)
print(f'After maxpool: {x.shape}')

x1 = backbone.layer1(x)
print(f'After layer1: {x1.shape}')

x2 = backbone.layer2(x1)
print(f'After layer2: {x2.shape}')

x3 = backbone.layer3(x2)
print(f'After layer3: {x3.shape}')

x4 = backbone.layer4(x3)
print(f'After layer4: {x4.shape}')
